We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

We’re excited to announce that Pudgy World, our free to play browser-based game, is now live. Explore 12 unique towns across The Berg, help Pengu find Polly, and play mini-games, all on . Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre) There will be two cohorts of crypto projects: those with government relations and those without. We believe being leaders on the Hill will pay huge dividends as...

When I took over Pudgy with the guys ~4 years ago, I never imagined we’d one day be representing the brand before Congress. Amazing to pitch and see lawmakers getting behind real-world, mass market use cases of crypto. sales bot. Give it a follow!

Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open Locals @ Azuki HQ Tomorrow (Tue 4/21) at 6:30pm, See you there!
